metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_397
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Flotillin-2 regulates in cooperation with Rab11a membrane trafficking processes in spines and participates in LTP-related AMPA receptor (GluA1) surface exposure in mouse hippocampal neurons.

13/4/2017 Pim
Fig.4
- shRNA KD of Reggie1 or reggie2 results in reduction of surface AMPAR clusters in a protocol of chemical LTP.. Experimental description: Hippocampal neurons from 1 to 2 d old wt C57BL/6J and reggie-1 k.o. (Flot2-/-) mice. (p 32)
Reggie-1 knock-out (k.o.; Flot2 -/-) C57BL/6J mice were generously provided by Tak W. Mak (The Campbell Family Institute for Breast Cancer Research, University Toronto, Canada; Berger et al., 2013). K.o. and wild type (wt) C57BL/6J mice were raised in the animal facility, University of Konstanz. Male and female mice, 1-2 d and 2 months old, were used.

20/3/2017 Pim
- The species of overexpression constructs used in this paper are not relevant for species determination since they merely serve as specificity controls for KD/KO conditions.
